# Eastern Province Saudi Arabia

**Summary**: The eastern region of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-makki|Makki, 2024]] conducted field studies in the eastern-province-saudi-arabia to sample sand dunes.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2024-makki|Makki, 2024]] Desert environment with barchan dunes.
